Adolescent Health
Public Health Youth Advisory Council

About
The Los Angeles County Department of 
										Public Health Youth Advisory Council is 
										a newly formed group of youth brought 
										together to increase youth involvement 
										within the Department. The Council is 
										part of the Department’s new Positive 
										Youth Development Initiative that aims 
										to promote positive outcomes for young 
										people by providing opportunities that 
										build on strengths and empower 
										next-generation change makers to reach 
										their full potential.
Through the Public Health Youth Advisory 
										Council, members:
Work directly with DPH staff at a public 
										health center, serving as local DPH 
										youth ambassadors and gaining hands-on 
										community-level work experience.
Develop leadership and advocacy skills through 
										monthly Youth Advisory Council meetings 
										focused strengthening youth voice, and 
										personal and group competencies.
Learn about the various public health issues impacting Los Angeles County residents 
										and on how the Department works to address them.
Advise and make appropriate recommendations regarding health issues of special interest to 
										youth within Los Angeles County, and help guide the work of the Department of 
										Public Health.
Customer Results Statement
A public health youth advisory council with adult partners collaboratively designing, implementing, and evaluating policies and programs that improve adolescent health and well-being in Los Angeles County.
Program Purpose
To provide opportunities for youth to learn about public health issues and partner with DPH to improve public health services for youth in Los Angeles County.
How to Work with the Public 
										Health Youth Advisory Council
For county or 
										community-based programs interested in 
										partnering with the Public Health Youth 
										Advisory Council, please complete the
Partnership 
										Request Form.pd
f
and submit to:
YouthAdvisoryCouncil@ph.lacounty.gov
.
Requests will be reviewed in partnership 
										with the Youth Advisory Council on a 
										rolling basis.
